title: Versioned protocol layer in agent runtime
objective: Create services.agent_runtime.protocols with common internal events, AG-UI v1 adapter, protocol metadata and versioned UI commands.
non_goals: Do not add non-AG-UI native protocol unless a concrete gap is documented.
acceptance_checks: AG-UI stream remains compatible with CopilotKit.
UI commands are versioned and namespaced under /localBusiness.
Unknown extensions can be ignored by clients.
Tests cover event ordering, metadata and invalid signatures.
